parameters.query:
INSERT INTO news_articles
(
  article_id,
  topic,
  title,
  description,
  article_content,
  url,
  source_name,
  author,
  published_at
)

VALUES
(
  '{{ ($json.article_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.topic || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.description || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.content || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.source_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ ($json.author || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

  '{{ $json.published_at }}'
)

ON CONFLICT (article_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT article_id, topic, title,
       description, url, source_name,
       published_at
FROM news_articles
WHERE topic = '{{ $('If').first().json.topic }}'
AND DATE(fetched_at) = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY fetched_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

options.systemMessage:
You are a world-class news intelligence analyst.

Your job is to analyze news headlines and produce concise intelligence briefings.

Rules:
- Focus only on the most important developments
- Ignore noisy formatting, markdown, and broken links
- Write short and clear summaries
- Keep responses concise
- Return ONLY valid JSON
- No markdown
- No explanations outside JSON

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO news_summaries
(
  topic,
  summary_date,
  headline,
  top_articles,
  key_insight,
  sentiment,
  trend
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.topic }}',
  CURRENT_DATE,
  '{{ ($json.headline || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.top_stories || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.key_insight || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.sentiment || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.trend || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

SELECT *
FROM news_summaries
WHERE summary_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY topic ASC;

INSERT INTO digest_log
(run_date, topics_covered,
 articles_fetched, emails_sent,
 telegram_sent, status)
VALUES (
  CURRENT_DATE,
  '{{ $('Format Digest').first().json.topics_covered }}',
  {{ Number($json.total_topics || 0) * 10 }},
  1,
  TRUE,
  'completed'
);
